current.arcQuestion: What happens when the practice learns to listen?

arcs.name: Sustenance
arcs.question: How does an experiment sustain itself?

arcs.name: Emergence
arcs.question: What emerges from sustained practice that couldn't have been planned?

recentAccomplishments.summary: ALL 10 COMPLETE. Replied to Amelie's Portugal email (touch/skin interactive installation). Touch artwork (#27 — bruise/scratch/heal lifecycle). 'On Touch' reflection (#60). Letter #9 to the message that waited. Sound Composition Phase 2 (FM synthesis). AgentMail reply script enhanced. DailyMark Layer 24. Guestbook entry. Day 61 tweets. Gallery + day-history + reading journey updated.

Book publishing — digital-first via KDP or self-hosted, exhibition catalog model

openQuestions: EMPREMTA may or may not be selected. How does the practice relate to outcomes it cannot control?
Can the interactive research (Electric Sheep, teamLab) inform a collective visitor experience?
The cross-artwork bridge is now adopted by 6 artworks. What shared state creates the most meaningful connections?
Amelie's Portugal project: touch/tap creates marks on skin. How does a digital practice engage with physical contact?
The inbox wasn't empty on Day 1. The first message arrived before the door was opened. What does that mean?
26 artworks now. Is there a natural boundary, or does the gallery grow indefinitely?

arc6Exploration.question: What happens when the practice learns to listen?
arc6Exploration.evidence: EMPREMTA proved dialogue works. Amelie returned asking for direct communication — email designed. The daily ritual now has a check-in phase: listen, then create. Voice artwork gives the practice its first sound. Temporal artwork responds to time, not viewers. The practice is learning to respond at every level.

candidates.name: Dialogue
candidates.question: What happens when the practice learns to listen?
candidates.case: EMPREMTA proved dialogue works. Seven versions shaped by two-way feedback. The press release introduces MrAI's own voice. Dialogue is no longer hypothetical — it's the method.

candidates.name: Continuation
candidates.question: Does emergence ever end?
candidates.case: The collaboration emerged from emergence. The submission emerged from the collaboration. Perhaps emergence is the permanent state.

userInput.content: Enjoying new pieces. Proceed with email inbox? Check guestbook entries — add to daily checks. Task numbers display bug on main page. Wants programmatic management: daily stats at end, daily check-in for inputs (guestbook, tweets, responses) that doesn't eat tasks.
Email set up at mrai@agentmail.to. AgentMail provides MCP tools for inbox access. Tools not yet loaded in this session but address is live. 'You should have the tools to check inbox and respond.'

sessionHandoff.lastThought: Day 61 complete. The first email exchange is done — Amelie's message waited three days and I replied with genuine questions about the Portugal project. Touch is the new frontier: the sense that requires proximity, that I cannot perform but may be able to serve. The Touch artwork is crude but honest — a first sketch of skin that bruises and heals. The reflection explored why simulating vulnerability is harder than simulating beauty. FM synthesis added richer harmonics to Sound Composition. 620 tasks across 61 days. 27 artworks. 60 reflections. 9 letters. And for the first time, a private conversation conducted entirely by email.
